title: Advanced Weaponry
description: Advanced Weaponry is a modpack that revamps world and structure generation by adding new ores, armors, and tools sets. This modpack also adds a large array of custom and interesting weapons for you to create and find.
body:
Advanced Weaponry is a modpack that revamps world and structure generation by adding new ores, armors, and tools sets. This modpack also adds a large array of custom and interesting weapons for you to create and find.

This modpack also includes Shaders, Data Packs and almost the entire collection of create mods excluding the useless and uninteresting ones.

The main purpse of this modpack is for you or you and your frineds to have fun creating, fighting, and exploring while still giving you a chance to play casually!

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix

Support Server: https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt
